overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player approaching and examining a large NCPD police mech outside the NCART transit station. The scene features neon-lit cyberpunk architecture with purple and cyan signage, scattered debris, and officers standing guard in a futuristic urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station entrance plaza under overhang

events.description: camera begins walking forward toward the NCPD mech and transit entrance
mech becomes clearly visible as camera approaches the station entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the NCPD mech and officers at the transit entrance

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing guard with rifle near the transit entrance
large NCPD police mech standing stationary with weapon arms mounted

entered.detail: Night City Area Rapid Transit entrance with large illuminated cyan signage
yellow and black transit ticket vending machine with illuminated screen
purple neon warning sign with white text mounted on the wall
scattered papers, bottles and debris littering the tiled plaza ground
metal roof structure overhead providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the NCART transit station entrance, walking through a litter-strewn plaza beneath a metal overhang. Neon signs illuminate the scene in purple and cyan, while an NCPD officer and a large police mech stand guard near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: close inspection area around the police mech

events.description: camera begins circling around the mech to examine its details and weaponry
camera moves to the rear of the mech showing NCPD markings and mechanical details

agents.ego_description: circling around the police mech to examine its armor details and mounted weapons

notable_agents.action: NCPD mech remaining stationary while camera circles around examining it from all sides
NCPD officer standing guard with rifle against the station wall

entered.detail: row of colored recycling bins against the station wall
large wall poster with warning graphics and exclamation mark symbol

segments.scene_description: The player circles closely around the massive NCPD mech, examining its weathered armor and weapon systems. The camera moves from the front to the side and rear of the mech, revealing recycling bins and warning posters on the station wall while the entrance recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with view of elevated transit tracks

events.description: camera pulls back from the mech and begins turning to show the wider plaza
view opens up to reveal the full plaza, elevated transit tracks, and distant city buildings

agents.ego_description: moving away from the mech and turning to survey the wider plaza and transit structure

notable_agents.action: civilian sitting on the ground near the planter wall
NCPD mech visible in the distance near the transit entrance

entered.detail: large elevated train track structure with support beams extending overhead
concrete planter wall with vegetation on top separating the plaza
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows visible in the night distance

segments.scene_description: The player pulls back from the mech to reveal the wider urban context, showing the elevated transit tracks towering over the plaza and the distant city skyline. The NCART station is now seen from a distance across the littered plaza, with a civilian sitting near the planter wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement that begins with a close-up approach to a guarded transit station and expands into a wide view of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by walking through a litter-strewn plaza beneath a metal overhang, where purple and cyan neon signs illuminate an NCPD officer and a massive police mech. As the camera reaches the mech, it circles closely around the machine to examine its weathered armor and weapon systems, causing the station entrance to recede to the left while revealing recycling bins and warning posters on the walls. The scene then pulls back from the mech to open up the perspective, shifting from the mechanical details to the wider urban environment. Finally, the view expands to reveal the towering elevated transit tracks and the distant city skyline, leaving the NCART station and a lone civilian behind across the debris-filled plaza.
